nodes.title: LTX models used in  this workflow
widgets_values:
## 📦 Required Models & Assets

### 🧠 Diffusion Model
- **LTX-2.3-22B-DISTILLED-1.1-GGUF**  
  🔗 [Download](https://huggingface.co/Abiray/LTX-2.3-22B-DISTILLED-1.1-GGUF/tree/main)

---

### 🎥 Video & 🔊 Audio VAE
- **LTX2_video_vae_bf16.safetensors**  
- **LTX2_audio_vae_bf16.safetensors**  
  🔗 [Download](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy/tree/main/VAE)

---

### 📝Clip Text / Instruction Model
- **gemma-3-12b-it-abliterated-sikaworld-high-fidelity-edition-Ltx-2**  
  🔗 [Download](https://huggingface.co/Sikaworld1990/gemma-3-12b-it-abliterated-sikaworld-high-fidelity-edition-Ltx-2/tree/main)

---

### 🔤 Clip Text Encoder / Embeddings
- **ltx-2-19b-embeddings_connector_distill_bf16.safetensors**  
  🔗 [Download](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy/tree/main/text_encoders)

---

### 🔍 Spatial Upscaler
- **ltx-2-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors**  
  🔗 [Download](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2/tree/main)


```

📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │      └── ltx-2-19b-distilled-Q6_k.gguf
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │      ├── ltx-2-19b-embeddings_connector_distill_bf16.safetensors
│   │      └── gemma-3-12b-it-q4_0.gguf
│   ├── 📂 vae/
│   │      ├── LTX2_video_vae_bf16.safetensors
│   │      └── LTX2_audio_vae_bf16.safetensors
│   └── 📂 latent_upscale_models/
│          └── ltx-2-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors

```

# VRGameDevGirl84 LTX 2.3 Text-to-Video LoRAs

Stylized text-to-video generation using **VRGameDevGirl84's LTX 2.3 LoRAs + Workflow**, adapted to run on Comfy Cloud.

## How to Use
1. Pick a LoRA from the `lora_name` dropdown
2. Include its **trigger word** in your prompt (e.g., `F3ltCut0u7` for Cozy Felt)
3. Set duration and frame rate, then queue

## Defaults
1920×1080 • 25 fps • LoRA strength 1.00 • CRF 13

## Resources
**LoRAs, triggers & prompt guides:** [huggingface.co/collections/vrgamedevgirl84/ltx-23-loras](https://huggingface.co/collections/vrgamedevgirl84/ltx-23-loras)

*Credit to [VRGameDevGirl84](https://huggingface.co/vrgamedevgirl84) for the original LoRAs and workflow.*

nodes.title: Enhanced Prompt (Positive)
widgets_values: blurry, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, noisy, oversharpened, overexposed, underexposed, flat lighting, neon lighting, modern objects, vehicles, technology, urban elements, sci-fi elements, cartoon, anime, 3d render, cgi, photorealistic, plastic materials, game engine look, bad anatomy, extra limbs, fused fingers, duplicate characters, floating objects, text, watermark, logo, daylight, bright colors, cheerful mood, monsters, action pose, clean surfaces, polished stone, unrealistic reflections, low detail textures, smooth gradients, no brush strokes

nodes.title: Enhanced Prompt (Positive)
widgets_values: F3ltCut0u7, felt cutout style, a cute chubby French bulldog with big round eyes and tiny perked ears, mid-burrow under a patchwork felt quilt with only its head and front paws poking out, the quilt rumpled and lifted in the air from its movement, layered felt cutout shapes forming the bulldog's content wrinkled face mid-yawn with tongue curled, visible stitched seams along its body, soft fuzzy felt fibers, embroidered stars on the quilt bunching into folds, a plush felt teddy bear tumbling sideways from being nudged, tiny felt nightstand with a glowing lantern, crescent moon and stitched stars visible through a felt window, soft cinematic lighting with warm lamplight glow, gentle layered shadows, handcrafted miniature diorama, sleepy storybook mood
